wm-license-cc-by-sa-3.0-text: Ta faayel [[{{int:wm-license-cc-wiki-link}}| Gulub Cijaajinnah]] leshshensahi geridde [[creativecommons:by-sa/3.0/deed.en|Attribution-Share Alike 3.0 Unported]] leshshensa le faayel kinni.
wm-license-cc-conditions-attribution-tex: Fadhdhishima cawat taxaw kolle taxaw kolle tane, lishshensaati dhibbashle kab-ishsheh badale yekkeh yinniyemko taybaaw kolle tane. Abak lel fadhdhishima araxah ab kibah, lishshensaati wanna koyyah hido ku ciyyoh izne yoxoyem balih takko alle mitane.
wm-license-cc-conditions-share_alike-tex: Tezgellemko, tiybiddilemko, hido amaa sugtemhi bukalle abtemko, tamaa [[ccorg:share-your-work/licensing-considerations/compatible-licenses|asli lishshensa]] hido awwal tiyaalih akah tadiyeekah ishi gabat-agle tayfaddago kolle tane.
